name: Bug Report
description: Report a bug, defect, or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG]: "
labels: ["bug"]
---------------

# Bug Report

## Summary

Provide a short description of the issue.

## Problem Description

Describe the bug in detail.

What happened?
When did it happen?
What was the impact?

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to:
2. Click:
3. Enter:
4. Submit:
5. Observe:

## Expected Behavior

Describe what should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what actually happened.

## Screenshots / Recordings

Attach screenshots, screen recordings, or error messages if available.

## Environment

### Device Type

* [ ] Desktop
* [ ] Mobile
* [ ] Tablet

### Browser

* [ ] Chrome
* [ ] Firefox
* [ ] Edge
* [ ] Safari
* [ ] Other

### Operating System

Specify operating system and version.

## Severity

* [ ] Critical
* [ ] High
* [ ] Medium
* [ ] Low

## Possible Cause

If known, describe the suspected cause.

## Additional Context

Add any other information that may help investigate the issue.

## Checklist

* [ ] I have searched existing issues before creating this report.
* [ ] I have provided steps to reproduce the issue.
* [ ] I have included screenshots or logs where applicable.
* [ ] The issue is reproducible.
